title: Customer Retention & Churn Analysis
summary: Analyzed e-commerce customer data to identify churn patterns, built a Random Forest model to predict churn, and developed an interactive Power BI dashboard.
analysis: Identified churn drivers via feature importance and customer segmentation

title: Customer Behaviour & Marketing Funnel Analysis
summary: Analyzed website traffic and user engagement data using a Google Analytics dataset. Developed an interactive Power BI dashboard to visualize traffic and engagement insights.
analysis: Mapped user journey from acquisition to conversion across channels

title: Retail Sales Performance Analytics
summary: Focused on extracting meaningful insights from real-world retail datasets and presenting them through effective visualizations. Conducted EDA to understand patterns and correlations.
analysis: Uncovered seasonal trends, top-performing categories, and revenue drivers

title: OpenMediaVault NAS Setup
summary: Built a Network Attached Storage (NAS) system using OpenMediaVault on a Debian-based environment, enabling centralized file storage, secure data access, and network-based file sharing. Configured services like SMB/CIFS and remote access for efficient data management.
analysis: Designed centralized storage with secure remote access
